message:
fix(coach): additional bug fixes from code review

- Add deserializeSettings() with type validation for localStorage settings
- Use deserializeSettings() in hydration to prevent invalid settings values
- Fix HypothesisQualityChecker to pass onBypass prop so "Continue anyway" works
- Import LEVEL_THRESHOLDS in CoachProgress to avoid hardcoded values
